programme.title: 30 Years of the PDC World Champs'
programme.desc: In celebration of 30 years of the PDC World Darts Championship, take a look back at the very first tournament, a classic final from 2007 and one of the greatest legs ever played. Ep 1.

programme.title: The Taylor Years
programme.desc: Hear from the legendary Phil Taylor as the 16-time world champion recounts his glory years at the PDC World Darts Championship. Ep 2.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Arsenal/Spurs 08
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal meet Tottenham Hotspur in the north London derby in 2008-09 season, in a match that saw a stunning comeback.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man U/Arsenal '98
programme.desc: Remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal visit Alex Ferguson's Manchester United at Old Trafford back in the 1997-98 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man Utd/Everton 2012
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Man Utd host Everton at Old Trafford in a captivating eight-goal thriller back in 2012.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Newc/Leics '97
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Newcastle United host Leicester City in a seven-goal thriller at St James' Park in the 1996-97 season.

programme.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

programme.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

programme.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Sheffield Wednesday take on Newcastle United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship, with both sides looking for promotion chances.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a three-hour test of wills, Justine Henin was bidding to close an up-and-down year with the defence of her WTA Finals title against Maria Sharapova in 2007.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a match that would decide the 2016 year-end world number one, Andy Murray - looking to cap a storybook season at The O2 in London - met rival Novak Djokovic at the ATP Finals.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Fulham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Remember some classic matches from English football. In this episode, Fulham looked to maintain their playoff hopes against Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship in April 2017.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: N. Forest v Ipswich
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Nottingham Forest look to avoid relegation from the Sky Bet Championship as they face Ipswich Town in May 2017.

programme.title: EFL 12/13: Brentford v Swindon
programme.desc: Remember some classic matches from English football. Here, Brentford face Swindon Town in May 2013 in the League 1 semi final at Griffin Park.

programme.title: EFL 12/13: Bradford v Arsenal
programme.desc: A look at some of the greatest matches from English football. Here, League 2 side Bradford City take on Premier League giants Arsenal in the Football League Cup in December 2012.

programme.title: ATP Final: Rotterdam
programme.desc: Top seed Alex de Minaur competes in his third consecutive Rotterdam final as former champion Felix Auger-Aliassime bids to deny the Australian a long-awaited trophy at the ATP 500. (15.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Dallas
programme.desc: Taylor Fritz and Ben Shelton - the Dallas top two - vie for the crown. Fritz downed Marin Cilic in the semi-finals, while Shelton dethroned reigning champion Denis Shapovalov. (15.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: One win away from his first title on home soil, Argentine Francisco Cerundolo competes for the Buenos Aires title against second seed Luciano Darderi of Italy. (15.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Adding the Doha title to her successful Australian Open defence, Victoria Azarenka kept Serena Williams at bay as the top two seeds served up a memorable final in 2013.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: A 36-year-old Novak Djokovic rolled back the years in a three-set classic against world number one Carlos Alcaraz to claim the Cincinnati title - his 39th ATP Masters 1000 crown.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '94
programme.desc: A chance to relive a Premier League classic. Here, arch rivals Liverpool and Manchester United meet at Anfield back in 1994 in a match that saw one of the Premier League's great comebacks.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Swansea/C Palace '16
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Swansea City take on Crystal Palace at the Liberty Stadium in a high-scoring encounter in the 2016-17 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Charlton/WHU '01
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Charlton Athletic take on West Ham United at The Valley in November 2001 in a pulsating encounter that went down to the wire.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man City/Man Utd 2002
programme.desc: Relive one of the Premier League's great games. Here, Manchester City take on Manchester United back in 2002 in the last Manchester derby to be played at Maine Road.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, a PGA Tour event staged in California. Rory McIlroy finished two clear of Shane Lowry to claim victory a year ago. (15.02)

programme.title: PL Darts: Antwerp
programme.desc: Antwerp stages night two as Luke Humphries and Luke Littler face off in a repeat of the 2025 Premier League final. Plus, MVG plays Josh Rock and Gerwyn Price battles Gian van Veen.

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Rotterdam
programme.desc: Top seed Alex de Minaur competes in his third consecutive Rotterdam final as former champion Felix Auger-Aliassime bids to deny the Australian a long-awaited trophy at the ATP 500. (15.02)

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the 2026 WM Phoenix Open at TPC Scottsdale in Arizona. Thomas Detry claimed his maiden PGA Tour win here last season, becoming the first Belgian to do so. (08.02)

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, a PGA Tour event staged in California. Rory McIlroy finished two clear of Shane Lowry to claim victory a year ago. (15.02)

programme.title: The Greatest Final 07:Taylor v RVB
programme.desc: In the final act at the Circus Tavern, two of the finest players to have ever played the sport created a match for the ages, as Phil Taylor and Raymond van Barneveld met in the final. Ep 3.

programme.title: John Part's Journey 2001-08
programme.desc: Follow John Part's PDC World Darts Championship journey from 2001 to 2008, a timespan in which the Canadian laid claim to three glorious triumphs. Ep 4.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Watford meet Fulham at Vicarage Road in October 2006 in a remarkable match that had a dramatic late finish.

programme.title: PL Greatest : West Ham/Man Utd '11

programme.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights

programme.desc: Offering teams one last chance to fine tune their cars ahead of a season bringing a wave of new technical regulations, pre-season testing resumes with day one in a three-day batch.

programme.desc: 3/52. Chan urrainn dha Posy cadal oir chan eil a dèideag, Losgann, aice aig pàrtaidh-oichche. Posy can't settle as she doesn't have her toy, Losgann, at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daolag-bhreac is Seillean/Ladybird & Bee
programme.desc: 11/26. Tha sinn a' dèanamh danns' le seanganan an-diugh. We are dancing with ants today.

programme.title: Coig Criomagan CBBC ALBA
programme.desc: 1/2. Calum Dòmhnallach le taghadh de na còig criomagan a b' fheàrr a chòrd ris fhèin. Calum Macdonald introduces a selection of his favourite facts.

programme.title: An Sgoil
programme.desc: 1/7. Bliadhna sgoile ùr agus èiginn ùr aig Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche. A new school year and new crisis at Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche.

programme.title: Vets: Gach Creutair Beo
programme.desc: 7/8. Cù ann an Inbhir Ùige, sioraf nach eil gu math agus caora ann an èiginn ann an Uibhist. A dog in Wick with an injured eye, a giraffe is under the weather and lambing time in Uist.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic
programme.desc: 6/13. Musician and learner Andrew Findlater joins Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean takes an earthly walk, provoking thoughts of space and the galaxies around us.

programme.title: Mas Fhior

programme.title: An t-Eilean/The Island
programme.desc: 2/4. Kat fights to gather evidence against Sir Douglas. But new revelations change everything. Contains some strong language and some violent scenes.

programme.title: Binneas - Na Trads

programme.title: Machair
programme.desc: 12/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.

programme.title: Fraochy Bay
programme.desc: 7/10. Herman Lee is a very naughty boy. He is making crop circles to earn a bit of extra money, but he is also about to get a surprise.

programme.title: Alleluia!
programme.desc: 2/6. Chloe Steele performs Sìn do làmh, a Mhoire and we hear Psalm 1 from Glasgow Gaelic Musical Association.

programme.title: Orain CBeebies
programme.desc: 7/7. Taghadh farsaing de dh'òrain bho Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh agus sgioba CBeebies ALBA. A selection of songs from Carrie, Linda, Ruairidh and the CBeebies ALBA presenters.

programme.title: Peataichean/Pets

programme.title: Gasta a' Ghraineag/Happy the Hoglet
programme.desc: 26/26. Tha an t-uisg' a' cur bacadh air Gasta, oir chan fhaigh e air 'dathan' a chluich' a-muigh. The rain hinders Gasta from playing 'colours' outside today.

programme.title: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)

programme.desc: 7/13. Tha Flix 'son film fhaicinn ach, gu mì-fhortanach, the e ro òg 'son fhaicinn. Flix would like to see a film, but unfortunately he's too young to get in.

programme.title: Seonaidh/Shaun the Sheep

programme.desc: 2/3. Hannah a' toirt sùil air ais air cuid de na caractaran iongantach a thadhail air CBBC ALBA. Hannah introduces some of the surprising characters who have visited the CBBC Alba studio.

programme.desc: 19/80. Mairi NicAonghais a' leughadh Sid nan Sia Dìnnearan. Mairi MacInnes reads Sid nan Sia Dìnnearan.

programme.title: An Doimhne/The Deep
programme.desc: 6/13. Tha Fionn a' feuchainn ri athair a stad is tha e feumach air taic bho Na Neachdan. Fionn is trying to stop his father and needs help from the Neachdan family.

programme.title: An Sgoil
programme.desc: 1/7. Bliadhna sgoile ùr agus èiginn ùr aig Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche. A new school year and new crisis at Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche.

programme.title: Coig Criomagan CBBC ALBA
programme.desc: 1/2. Calum Dòmhnallach le taghadh de na còig criomagan a b' fheàrr a chòrd ris fhèin. Calum Macdonald introduces a selection of his favourite facts.

programme.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...
programme.desc: ...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 40/52. The Spuds join Betty on a work trip across America. Will a surprising body swap help their American dreams come true?

programme.title: Vets: Gach Creutair Beo
programme.desc: 7/8. Cù ann an Inbhir Ùige, sioraf nach eil gu math agus caora ann an èiginn ann an Uibhist. A dog in Wick with an injured eye, a giraffe is under the weather and lambing time in Uist.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic
programme.desc: 19/26. Singer James Graham chats to Joy, and Calum Maclean learns about bagpipes by visiting a pipe band and a workshop where the instruments are made and repaired.

programme.title: An Là
programme.desc: Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.

programme.title: Rathad Ramsay
programme.desc: 3/8. Ramsay MacMahon walks the length of Loch Arklet in the company of Kerry MacPhee. Tha Ramsay MacMahon a'coiseachd faid Loch Arcleit ann an cuideachd Kerry Nic a' Phì.

programme.title: Cumhachd Hitler | Hitler's Power
programme.desc: 2/3. Hitler's establishment of a totalitarian dictatorship after becoming Reich chancellor. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Brunch le Abigail
programme.desc: 6/12. Tha Abigail a' toirt thugainn beachd annasach airson treat, Dutch Baby. Abigail shares an idea for an unusual treat - a Dutch baby.

programme.title: Dàna | Scotland's Wild Side
programme.desc: 1/6. Coinneach MacFhraing makes the journey over to the remote island of Mingulay, home to some of the most spectacular sea cliffs in Europe.

programme.title: Sar-Sgeoil - Nineteen Eighty-Four
programme.desc: Cathy MacDonald reveals George Orwell's time on Jura, and the writing of 1984. Cathy Dhòmhnallach ag innse mar a chaidh le Orwell ann an Diùraidh, agus sgrìobhadh 1984.

programme.title: OMC!
programme.desc: 1/4. Sketch show featuring a collection of comic characters, spoofs, unrequited love and comedy horror.

programme.title: The Farthest: Voyager's Interstellar Journey
programme.desc: The story of Voyager, an epic of human achievement, personal drama and miraculous success.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone: The Golden...
programme.desc: ...Ages of British Sculpture. 1/3. A look at how the era's sculpture casts a new light on medieval times in Britain. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Face the Music
programme.desc: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Polly Elwes, Richard Baker and John Julius Norwich. With guest musician Yvonne Minton.

programme.title: The Australian Wars
programme.desc: 1/3. How modern-day Sydney was the first battleground of the frontier wars. Contains some violent scenes.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: 5/6. Documentary series. China's heartland is the centre of a 5,000-year-old civilization and home to the giant panda, golden snub-nosed monkey and the golden takin.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: Snow Man's Land. As another snowstorm approaches Nome, Vernon sets up his operation on the promising Claim 56. The Kellys race to get their new equipment on the ice. S10, Ep22

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: In Western Australia, Alan and Salty hope a local legend will lead them to buried treasure. A new team come face-to-face with the dangers of flying choppers. S9, Ep4

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Nautical Deathtrap. Freak tides trap Sig in dangerous seas, as Jake battles to get to port. Rick attempts to turn a heart-wrenching tragedy into a triumph for Jacob. S19, Ep22

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: Wreck In The Shallows. Darrell heads to a shipwreck linked to Gordo's list. He leads his team to the shallows where the tough winds and waves have claimed centuries worth of ships. S2, Ep3

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: Return Of The Yeti. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory. S1, Ep1

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: The Monster And The Mountain. Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves. Plus, he investigates the mystical ties the fabled beast has with the Nepalese people. S1, Ep2

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Winter's Fury. The Raneys help the Russell family, who are struggling on a failing homestead. The food stocks are low, they don't know how to hunt and their cabin is collapsing. S1, Ep1

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Abandoned & Alone. The Raneys help Beth and Mike, who live in a ghost town in Montana. Stalked by a mountain lion, and devoid of any livestock, water or food, survival is a struggle. S1, Ep2

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Attack Of The Cacti. After the birth of Daniel's child, the Rookies return to Coober Pedy. Kelly and Al battle a deadly cactus in their hunt for the most valuable opal. S1, Ep4

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Brother Vs. Brother. Brothers Peter and Mick Cooke face off in a scrapheap challenge to build a opal hunting machine. And, the rookies resort to night time hunting. S1, Ep5

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Zero Hour. King Crab season draws to a close. Casey forces Josh to fish at full throttle on the Cornelia Marie, and Jake takes another turn at the wheel on the Northwestern. S11, Ep8

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Hell's Bells. Christmas at sea for the Time Bandit is disturbed when an unhinged deckhand terrorizes the crew. Meanwhile, Jake Anderson awaits the birth of his baby. S11, Ep9

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Canyon Of The Apes. Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. S2, Ep7

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Smells Like Bigfoot. The team uses new methods to find Bigfoot in NorCal's backcountry, hoping to lure it out of hiding. Russell travels overnight to gather key evidence. S5, Ep6

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Marcus and Linden are confronted by a rival gold prospector. The Gold Timers call in a geologist for help, and Robbie storms off the Ferals' lease. S6, Ep9

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: My Deadly Face Tumor. In Sweden, Kim's had dozens of surgeries on a huge facial tumour, but stopped after he almost died. He needs one more operation - can he go through with it? S4, Ep9

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Worlds Biggest Cyst. Khalida goes to a hospital in Kashmir after suffering intense stomach pains. Doctors operate and are astonished to discover the world's biggest ovarian cyst. S4, Ep10

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment. S6, Ep6

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: Bite Club. A Bear, shark and rattlesnake attack survivor teams up with Brooke, an elite hunter. Together they tackle vicious lions and hyena in the harsh African feeding ground. S5, Ep8

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: Threesome. When a third survivalist crashes the challenge, tension and jealousy prove just as threatening as the heat, piranha and jaguars of the Ecuadorian rainforest. S5, Ep9

programme.desc: Jurassic River Beast. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, travels to the island of Tasmania in search of a colossal freshwater beast on the verge of disappearing forever. S1, Ep5

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Nautical Deathtrap. Freak tides trap Sig in dangerous seas, as Jake battles to get to port. Rick attempts to turn a heart-wrenching tragedy into a triumph for Jacob. S19, Ep22

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: Wreck In The Shallows. Darrell heads to a shipwreck linked to Gordo's list. He leads his team to the shallows where the tough winds and waves have claimed centuries worth of ships. S2, Ep3

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: Return Of The Yeti. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory. S1, Ep1

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: The Monster And The Mountain. Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves. Plus, he investigates the mystical ties the fabled beast has with the Nepalese people. S1, Ep2

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Winter's Fury. The Raneys help the Russell family, who are struggling on a failing homestead. The food stocks are low, they don't know how to hunt and their cabin is collapsing. S1, Ep1

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Abandoned & Alone. The Raneys help Beth and Mike, who live in a ghost town in Montana. Stalked by a mountain lion, and devoid of any livestock, water or food, survival is a struggle. S1, Ep2

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Attack Of The Cacti. After the birth of Daniel's child, the Rookies return to Coober Pedy. Kelly and Al battle a deadly cactus in their hunt for the most valuable opal. S1, Ep4

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Brother Vs. Brother. Brothers Peter and Mick Cooke face off in a scrapheap challenge to build a opal hunting machine. And, the rookies resort to night time hunting. S1, Ep5

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Zero Hour. King Crab season draws to a close. Casey forces Josh to fish at full throttle on the Cornelia Marie, and Jake takes another turn at the wheel on the Northwestern. S11, Ep8

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Hell's Bells. Christmas at sea for the Time Bandit is disturbed when an unhinged deckhand terrorizes the crew. Meanwhile, Jake Anderson awaits the birth of his baby. S11, Ep9

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Canyon Of The Apes. Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. S2, Ep7

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Smells Like Bigfoot. The team uses new methods to find Bigfoot in NorCal's backcountry, hoping to lure it out of hiding. Russell travels overnight to gather key evidence. S5, Ep6

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mountain of Madness: An avalanche traps Homer and Mr Burns in a mountain cabin during a team-building exercise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala (Annoyed Grunt) cious: Supernanny Shary Bobbins comes to the rescue of Marge, who is so stressed that her hair has started to fall out.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hail Barry: Despite his lack of sporting prowess, Barry tries to join the school football team.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam Spielberg: Adam writes an original script about Indiana Jones, but his passion for directing is challenged when he films it. Barry and Murray make a wager.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A Moving Day: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own when they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Bureau: Pimento's life is still in peril, so Captain Holt calls on an old friend in the FBI to help identify the crooked agent who tried to have him killed.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Greg and Larry: The squad drop everything when they realise that Holt is in danger as the search for Pimento's hitman takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In Marge We Trust: Homer discovers that a Japanese dishwashing powder company is using his face as its logo. And Marge dishes out advice to the church's parishioners.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's Enemy: A new power plant employee who's struggled to build a decent life is incensed that someone as foolish as Homer could seem so affluent. Bart buys a factory.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Abe League of Their Moe: Grampa and Moe bond over baseball, and hatch a plan to make the Springfield Isotopes great again.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Girl Code: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Nick Hewer, Stacey Solomon, Ricky Wilson and Perri Kiely tackle scones, a devilish technical and a self-portrait croquembouche showstopper.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the TV this time: Dynasties II, Pieces of Her, Celebrity Mastermind, Is It Cake?, TOTP: 1992 Biggest Hits, Hospital: Road to Recovery, and BBC News (Putin Rally).

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's top armchair critics have been watching Bridgerton, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Dynasties II, Starstruck, and ITV News (Will Smith).

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: Late Night with the Devil
programme.desc: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

programme.title: Radical
programme.desc: (2023) Uplifting, fact-based drama with Eugenio Derbez. An inspirational teacher literally and figuratively turns his class upside down in a Mexican border town. In Spanish/subs.

programme.title: The Man from Colorado
programme.desc: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret...
programme.desc: ...Weapon: (1942) WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody Interview...
programme.desc: ...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.

programme.title: Renfield
programme.desc: (2023) Comedy horror vampire shenanigans with Nicholas Hoult, Awkwafina and a full-blooded Nicolas Cage. Dracula's familiar gets distracted from procuring food for his master.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: Straightheads
programme.desc: (2007) Thriller with Gillian Anderson and Danny Dyer. On their way home from a party in the countryside, a couple are brutally attacked by thugs. Months later, they set out for vengeance.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: (2019) Supernatural horror. A nurse downloads an app which predicts that she'll be dead within days. As she uncovers its demonic roots, can she change her fate? Violence.

programme.title: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
programme.desc: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.desc: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

programme.desc: (1999) Couple Christopher Eccleston and Dervla Kirwin's relationship is tested when her former pen pal, Yvan Attal, turns up in Michael Winterbottom's drama. Strong language/sexual scenes.
